welcome

this is a fish. a fractal fish. <><. like all fish, <>< is composed of self similar parts themselves composed of self similar parts. organs, tissues, cells, proteins, etc until we reach the seussian realm of atoms and their mysterious constituents: all textile manifestations of the same fabric, loomed by cosmic spinsters.

test

In the glimmer-gloom glade of the Glotzberry Tree, Where the flumplebees flutter from B to the Bee, There lived a small fellow named Fizzle McFoon Who whistled at waffles and howled at the moon.

f.f one
